items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step titled 'Validate persona scenario #3' requires confirmation of the behavior related to sensitive data masking in extension logs. However, there is no evidence provided that directly addresses this requirement or demonstrates that the functionality has been implemented or tested. The linked use cases and prior steps do not include any relevant evidence to support the validation of this scenario, leading to an inconclusive status.
